dict.string: A feature coordinator: Router + delegate one-liners + destination factory

Creates a ‹Feature›Coordinator owning a typed Router, implementing the screens' NavigationDelegates as one-liners, and doubling as the destination factory (exhaustive view(for:) switch). Name the file after the feature, e.g. UsersCoordinator. Split the factory into a ‹Feature›DestinationFactory when it grows — see PalNavigation's coordinator triangle.
